captures.chat_api_url: https://duck.ai/duckchat/v1/chat (POST). Supporting: GET /duckchat/v1/auth/token, GET /duckchat/v1/status. Telemetry on improving.duckduckgo.com/t/*
captures.request_content_type: application/json (body: {model:"gpt-5-mini", messages:[{role:"user",content:"테스트입니다..."}], ...}; headers include x-vqd-hash/auth token from /auth/token)
captures.success_response_wire_sample: Duck.ai SSE: data: {"role":"assistant","message":"안녕","created":...,"model":"gpt-5-mini","action":"success"}\n\n ... data: [DONE]. NOTE: raw frame body taint-guarded (not captured); endpoint+method confirmed via read_network_requests (POST /duckchat/v1/chat). Telemetry wide_event confirms streaming: time_to_first_token=1411ms, time_to_last_token=3742ms, status=SUCCESS, model=gpt-5-mini, mode=chat, reasoning_mode=fast. One captured POST showed statusCode 503 (transient/earlier attempt) but final answer rendered + telemetry=SUCCESS. Exact bytes need CDP/HAR.
captures.frame_separator: SSE double-newline; data: JSON lines; terminator data: [DONE]

dom_render_structure.assistant_message: rendered with CSS-modules hashed classes (e.g. PBQZNIcKgp0FJ_yxBVaB inside UF8GjwsZHDPDmhfMJPOg pHy4erJAYftGH9zGlL6z); model label 'GPT-5 mini' shown above answer

captures.framework: React SPA with CSS Modules (hashed class names); no Next.js (#__next absent). DuckDuckGo proprietary 'duckai' component namespace.

screenshot_name: ss_7679zpygq (in-tool capture; not saved to disk)
notes: etap-bypassed clean baseline. Anonymous (Duck.ai requires no account; privacy-first, chats local). Benign prompt sent; GPT-5 mini replied '안녕하세요 — 오늘 기분은 어떠세요?'. Transport = SSE POST /duckchat/v1/chat with vqd auth token flow. Endpoint+method captured live via read_network_requests (rare clean hit). DOM uses data-testid taxonomy (user-message, duckai-chat-input) + CSS-module hashed classes for content. No console errors.
